DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eric McFarland, esq. (415-450-0295) of Thompson Welch for Plaintiff/opposing party.
Jason Hain, esq. (415-947-0797x.2141) of EDC for Defendant/Moving party.
Court reporter: Elizabeth Joy Lee CSR #828 (tel: 416-753-3474 email: lizleecsr@att.net).

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KRISTIN KRAMER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for ejectment. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that any notice (unlike in an unlawful detainer action) is required to state a cause of action for ejectment. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Elizabeth Joy Lee CSR #828 (tel: 416-753-3474 email: lizleecsr@att.net). (D501)
